title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial on AWS Cloud Development Kit (CDK) for building serverless applications using Infrastructure as Code. The video demonstrates building a REST API using CDK with Python, contrasting manual AWS console configuration with automated deployment via CDK.
